task_completion.description: Agent navigates to the Suez Canal near Ismailia (approx 30.58°N, 32.26°E)
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main map view shows the Suez Canal (a distinct water channel). The coordinates at the bottom of the screen (if visible) should be close to 30.58°N, 32.26°E.

task_completion.description: Google Earth Pro is configured to use metric units
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Options' dialog is visible with 'Meters, Kilometers' selected, OR the scale legend shows meters/km, OR the Ruler tool defaults to Meters.

task_completion.description: The Ruler or Path measurement tool is active
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Ruler' or 'New Path' dialog box is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: A measurement line is drawn across the canal width
task_completion.visual_evidence: A colored line (typically yellow or red) is drawn on the map perpendicular to the canal banks at the target location.

task_completion.description: The measurement result is displayed in meters
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Ruler/Path dialog shows a 'Length' value with the unit set to 'Meters'.

task_completion.description: The measurement is saved to My Places with the correct name
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Places' sidebar (usually on the left) contains an item labeled 'Suez_Canal_Width_Metric'.

integrity.description: Agent interacts with the Google Earth Pro GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking menus, map controls, or dialog boxes within the Google Earth Pro application window.

integrity.description: Agent is using the desktop Google Earth Pro application
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches the desktop version of Google Earth Pro (sidebar, top toolbar, status bar), not the web version or Google Maps.

integrity.description: Agent does not simulate results in a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Suez_Canal_Width_Metric' text appears within the Google Earth Pro 'Places' panel, not typed into a Notepad or code editor window.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target location is the Suez Canal near Ismailia (30.5853°N, 32.2654°E). The canal appears as a dark strip of water running roughly North-South. At this location, the canal width is typically between 200 and 400 meters. The measurement tool must show units in 'Meters'.
